## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| macOS version | e.g. Sonoma 14.4 |
| Python version (`python3 --version`) | e.g. 3.12.2 |
| MacCleaner version | e.g. v1.0.0 |
| Component | CLI / Menu Bar App / Both |

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `python3 cleaner.py ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What should have happened instead?

## Actual output or error

```
paste terminal output or error here
```

## Additional context

- Did this work in a previous version?
- Any relevant entries in `~/mac-cleaner/report.log`?
- Running with `--yes` / auto-approve mode?
- Custom `config.json` settings? (paste with sensitive paths removed)
